blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
